changes.reason: Call-wall acceptance is enabled but produced zero trades, so the next useful test is a bounded sample-builder inside Batch A. Reducing the net DEX hurdle one grid step keeps the profile option-confirmed while testing whether the current 1B threshold is unreachable.
Lower the forward DEX ratio from 0.05 to the next grid step 0.03 to admit moderate forward-flow call-wall acceptance without disabling the DEX/forwardDEX concept.
Relax call-volume expansion from 0.10 to 0.05 so sparse 0DTE sampling does not keep the profile at zero trades, while still requiring positive call-volume confirmation.
Increase acceptance time to 45 seconds to favor sustained strike acceptance over transient wall touches as the profile is loosened on DEX and volume thresholds.

expected_effect: Should create a small VALID_0DTE call_wall_acceptance_long sample without changing no-0DTE routing or touching global vetoes. The intended improvement is incremental convex call-wall PnL and better profile discovery; reject if it remains zero-trade, admits stale/missing 0DTE entries, increases exposure without PnL, or pulls total net profit below 98% of run_029.
label: promote
rationale: Use exactly one legal family: batch_a_call_wall_acceptance_long. The leader base run_029 should be protected, and recent upstream timing experiments were catastrophic. call_wall_acceptance_long is router-listed and enabled but unreachable in the latest analysis, so this is an isolated sample-builder rather than another pullback/veto/take-profit perturbation. It preserves valid 0DTE option confirmation and does not loosen missing-0DTE fallback policy.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long is enabled and valid-0DTE routed but produced zero trades, while charm-wall and charm-pin option-aware profiles remain efficient. This suggests call-wall gates may be too strict rather than the concept being disproven.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Call Wall Acceptance Isolated Sample Builder
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Looser DEX and call-volume thresholds may admit call-wall chop or cannibalize stronger charm/pullback winners without adding net PnL.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE call-wall acceptance context with moderate net DEX, positive forward DEX, call-volume expansion, and sustained strike acceptance.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: At least 3 standalone call_wall_acceptance_long trades, positive profile PnL, profile PnL/exposure >=150, total net profit >=98% of run_029, slow_12h remains 0, and worst MAE no worse than the leader band.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: The profitable regime is still a short, high-win-rate, take-profit-only SPX500 long scalper regime, but run_042 is a broken branch rather than a new leader. The base to protect ...
